title: Hutt Guardsman's Guild
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Hutt Guardsman's Guild''' was a society of [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguards]] that served the various [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] Lords. In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], with the aid of [[Quaffug]], [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] joined this group, under the alias [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Tamtel Skreej]] in order to infiltrate [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure's]] organization in preparation for the [[Rescue of Han Solo/Legends|rescue]] of [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]].

==Appearances==
